notes: Parquet-primary master update rebuilt on the proven 0.2.21 UI baseline.
Trace master updates now write Trace_Master.parquet while preserving Excel exports and Excel legacy/base files.
AS400 imports now write AS400_Master.parquet while preserving raw Excel attachments and Excel legacy/base files.
Existing Parquet masters are backed up before update.
Startup path remains close to 0.2.21 to avoid the 0.2.22 startup regression.
